endpoints.description: Multiple tags can be provided with comma separated strings. Use tag1, tag2, tag3 for testing.

endpoints.name: Find purchase order by ID
endpoints.description: For valid response try integer IDs with value >= 1 and <= 10. Other values will generated exceptions
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SWAGGER-PETSTORE_API_KEY}} with your SWAGGER-PETSTORE API KEY. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid.

endpoints.name: Delete purchase order by ID
endpoints.description: For valid response try integer IDs with positive integer value. Negative or non-integer values will generate API errors
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SWAGGER-PETSTORE_API_KEY}} with your SWAGGER-PETSTORE API KEY. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid.
